goal: every page above 9.5/10 across staff-design + skeptical-dev + AI-VC + anti-slop personas

metricClaims.bad-design-audit: score moving = user-visible polish — typography hierarchy, contrast, alignment, surface rhythm
metricClaims.persona-staff-design: score moving = Linear/Vercel-level visual craft a senior dev would respect
metricClaims.persona-skeptical-dev: score moving = install path is 5s clear, mechanism beats adjective, no crypto-cosplay alarms
metricClaims.persona-ai-vc: score moving = 30-sec test passes for Index/Thrive/Greylock partner, no DeFi/restaking/TNT bleed on AI funnel
metricClaims.persona-anti-slop: score moving = banned-word density and structural slop (every-X, future-of-X, premier, best-in-class) approaches zero
